prose.overview: Pleasant Valley Golf & Country Club is an 18-hole, par-72 course in Bangphra, Sriracha, Chonburi, designed by Golf East and opened in 2008. The course stretches to 7,002 yards and is described as more challenging than many of its Pattaya-region contemporaries, incorporating natural reed-filled swamps and ponds that cross fairways and demand precise management of both tee shots and approach plays. At approximately 1,600 THB for a round, Pleasant Valley offers mid-range pricing in the Sriracha area, and its relative difficulty compared to similarly priced courses has attracted a following among golfers who want a genuine test rather than a holiday-resort round. The Bangphra, Sriracha location places it close to several other Pattaya-area courses, making it a practical second or third round on a multi-course trip.
prose.layout_and_experience: The Golf East design integrates natural reed swamps and ponds as defining hazards rather than as decoration. On multiple holes, the swamps cross the fairway, requiring a decision on how much to carry off the tee and how to position the ball for the approach. The par-5 12th hole is the most demanding in this regard — a carry of approximately 200 yards is required to put the ball in play from the tee, making it a serious challenge for shorter hitters. The overall layout plays at 7,002 yards, which is substantial at par 72, and rewards golfers who manage their game strategically rather than relying on distance alone. The use of natural wetlands gives the course an authentic environmental character absent from purely manicured resort layouts.
prose.tips: Pleasant Valley is best suited to golfers who want a genuine challenge at an accessible price point. The swamps are not punishing in the same way as water hazards on some courses — there is often room to play a recovery — but the 200-yard carry on the 12th requires honest assessment of your distance off the tee. Carts are compulsory on weekend mornings, which affects the total cost of a weekend round — confirm the cart fee when booking. The Bangphra, Sriracha location sits close to Khao Kheow Country Club (also in Bangphra), making the two courses a natural pairing on a multi-day Pattaya trip. Weekday rounds avoid the cart requirement and are quieter overall.
prose.location_and_access: Pleasant Valley Golf & Country Club is located approximately 100km southeast of central Bangkok at 41/62 Moo 9, Bangphra, Sriracha, Chonburi 20110. The drive from Bangkok takes around 75 minutes via the Bang Na–Trat Expressway (Highway 7). The course is roughly 45 minutes north of central Pattaya city. Grab and pre-arranged golf transfers from Bangkok or Pattaya hotels are the standard transport options.
prose.rental_cta_context: Playing Pleasant Valley Golf Club in Sriracha? Rent clubs from LENGOLF and have them waiting at your hotel — ready for the 200-yard carry on the 12th.
